prose:
**Nitrobenzene fukui-reactivity (most electrophilic site)** — DFT tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) in PySCF via chemkit, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: fixed from user-supplied XYZ `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz` (no geometry optimization). Three single-point SCF calculations (neutral/cation/anion) converged without error. Fukui-plus (f+) and Fukui-minus (f−) indices were computed via Mulliken charges. SCF converged for all states; integrity checks passed (trustworthy =true). Warnings from integrity checks:
- sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
- sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
- common header present

Most electrophilic atom: C (atom 4) with f+ = 0.49641781. Plot of atom-wise reactivity chart: `nitrobenzene_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. Command used: `chemkit fukui nitrobenzene.xyz --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --out nitrobenzene_fukui_dft.json --stdout path`.
